subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God of existence and Sovereign over the unseen and the seen! Thou beholdest Thy loved ones among Thy servants who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله الوجود و المقتدر علی الغیب و الشهود تری احبائک بین عبادک الذین
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for protection
